text:
2006/9/2, Martin Wilke <miwi@freebsd.org>:
> We have commit stop for DESTDIR fixes, could you please rework this
> patch with WITHOUT_DESTDIR please. i will commit the update:)

Hi, Martin:

Okay, please fetch this patch and test again:
http://chinsan2.twbbs.org/chinsan/www6to4.diff

Thanks. :)

- chinsan
